title: OptimizedPVP+
description: A PvP-focused modpack optimized for maximum performance and smooth gameplay.
body:
A PvP-focused modpack optimized for maximum performance and smooth gameplay.
Designed specifically for competitive combat, this pack includes essential PvP-enhancing mods that improve your PvP experience, responsiveness, and overall enjoyment compared to vanilla. Unnecessary features are removed to keep FPS high and latency low, ensuring fast, consistent performance in every fight. Perfect for duels, practice servers, and competitive PvP environments.
